title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nykaa - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nykaa - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nykaa. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Nykaa:
Nykaa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa!
